name: Beef Jerky a La Willie
recipeInstructions:
Use in place of smoker.
Mix all ingredients except beef to make marinade. Cut thinly sliced beef into 1/2 inch strips and marinate for 8 to 12 hours. Smoke using mesquite chips for about three hours and then finish drying in oven. If doing the entire operation in an oven, use liquid smoke and hang strips of beef on the highest rack. Put a shallow pan underneath to catch drippings. Turn the oven off and leave it set at the lowest possible temperature for 6 to 8 hours until thoroughly dried. Use toothpicks or wooden skewers to hang meat by, and place layers of paper towels in the pan to collect drippings and save cleaning later on.
